product_overview: A fast, no-login web app that extracts and lets users download MP4 videos from Reddit post URLs. The UI is a single-page React app with a URL input, preview, and direct download link.
core_goals: Allow users to paste a Reddit post URL and download the highest-quality MP4 without requiring authentication
Provide a fast, minimal, and responsive single-page experience across mobile and desktop
Surface clear error messaging for invalid URLs, posts without video, and network/API failures
Offer accessible legal pages (Terms and Privacy) and a clear 404 experience for unknown routes

features.name: Reddit Video Downloader
features.description: Accept a Reddit post URL, fetch the post data from the Reddit API, present a playable MP4 preview and a direct download link without requiring login.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill reddit video URL input field with a valid Reddit post URL -> Click submit/download button -> App fetches reddit post via GET https://api.reddit.com/api/info/?id= -> See video preview with playable MP4 and a download link -> Click download link to save video -> Browser downloads MP4 file to user's device

Navigate to / -> Fill reddit video URL input field with an invalid or non-Reddit URL -> Click submit/download button -> App validates URL format and rejects it -> See error message indicating invalid URL and instructions to paste a Reddit post link

Navigate to / -> Fill reddit video URL input field with a valid Reddit post URL that contains no video -> Click submit/download button -> App fetches reddit post via GET https://api.reddit.com/api/info/?id= -> App determines the post has no video media -> See error message stating no downloadable video found for the provided URL

Navigate to / -> Fill reddit video URL input field with a valid Reddit post URL -> Click submit/download button -> App attempts to fetch reddit API but receives network or API error -> See error message indicating fetch failure and option to retry

features.name: Terms and Conditions Page
features.description: Display the site Terms and Conditions so users can review legal terms before using the service.
user_flows: Navigate to /terms -> See Terms and Conditions content displayed
Navigate to /terms -> Browser request for terms content fails due to network error -> See error message indicating content could not be loaded and option to retry

features.name: Privacy Policy Page
features.description: Display the Privacy Policy so users can review how data is handled.
user_flows: Navigate to /privacy -> See Privacy Policy content displayed
Navigate to /privacy -> Browser request for privacy content fails due to network error -> See error message indicating content could not be loaded and option to retry

features.name: Not Found (404) Page
features.description: Show a clear 404 page for unknown or invalid routes and provide a path back to the home downloader.
user_flows: Navigate to /non-existent-route -> See 404 Not Found page
Navigate to /non-existent-route -> See 404 Not Found page -> Click link to return to / -> See home page with URL input

routes.description: Home page to download reddit videos

features.name: Reddit Video Downloader
features.description: User can paste a Reddit URL and grab the mp4 video without login
user_interactions: Fill reddit video URL input field
Click download link to save video
See error message if invalid URL
